issue-triage.name: issue-triage
issue-triage.description: L1 issue triage. Reads state, scans open issues/PRs, proposes labels and priorities. Propose-only.
issue-triage.prompt: Read AGENTS.md, LOOP.md, issue-triage-state.md, and .claude/skills/issue-triage/SKILL.md. Use issues.json and prs.json as the signal source. Rewrite issue-triage-state.md with Top 5, suggested labels (allowlist only), a Needs-human bucket, and Noise. Append one block to loop-run-log.md. L1: propose only — never apply labels, never close issues. Escalate P0/P1/security/breaking-change to Needs-human.
